description: A candid color event photograph. It depicts an outdoor naturalization ceremony in progress: rows of U.S. Army soldiers in OCP camouflage uniforms stand at attention beside rows of empty white slip-covered banquet chairs on a concrete patio, several with right hands raised. The setting is a tan stucco event-venue building with large dark windows, string and festoon lights overhead, a light-blue pop-up canopy tent, and a partly cloudy sky. A few civilians in casual clothes stand at far left and right. It is a natural-light photograph with no overlaid text, slogans, or graphic design; the only marking is a small faint photographer or venue watermark in the lower-left corner. Per the tweet, this shows service members becoming new U.S. citizens at Oak Grove Racetrack, Kentucky.
notable_text: (none on image; small venue watermark logo only)
